name: canshare-lateralisable-topography
title: NZ cancer lateralisable topography
description: A body structure where cancer may be present, which is a paired either side of the body's midline or an 'Other' value.

filter.value: (^ 253141000210105 |New Zealand cancer topography reference set| AND ^ 723264001 |Lateralizable body structure reference set|) OR 340871000210109 |Level I axillary lymph node| OR 340881000210106 |Level II axillary lymph node| OR 340891000210108 |Level III axillary lymph node| OR 62683002 |Mediastinal lymph node| OR 54268001 |Pelvic lymph node| OR 818991007 |Abdominal lymph node| OR 35783009 |Para-aortic lymph node| OR 312501005 |Lymph node of head and neck| OR 47109002 |Thoracic lymph node| OR 23043003 |Uterine adnexa| OR 74964007 |Other|
